description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style axe with a single-piece construction, likely made from a durable metal or composite material. The handle is straight with a slight taper and features a geometric, angular design, including a lanyard hole at the base for easy carrying or hanging. The blade is broad and flat, with a pronounced angular cutout near the top, giving it a distinctive, aggressive appearance. The axe head includes a single cutting edge and a squared poll, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The entire object is finished in a matte black color, suggesting a non-reflective, utilitarian surface. There are no visible markings, engravings, or brand labels on the exterior.
description: A modern, matte black tactical axe with a geometric handle and a broad, angular blade featuring a distinctive cutout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the angular blade cutout and straight handle with a lanyard hole.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sharpness and flatness of the axe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main profile and again showing the blade cutout and handle geometry.
description_view_3: Reverse edge-on view, similar to view 1, showing the blade and handle thickness from the opposite side.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, angular handle made of polymer or coated metal, with a geometric cross-section and a lanyard hole at the base; designed for a secure grip.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, flat blade with a single cutting edge, angular cutout near the top, and a squared poll; modern tactical design with no beard.
attribute_mounting_style: Single-piece, molded or forged construction with integrated blade and handle.
